title: Implement an LRU cache
prompt: Create lru.mjs exporting class LRU. new LRU(capacity); set(k, v); get(k) returns the value or undefined and refreshes recency; when capacity is exceeded the LEAST recently used key is evicted. A `size` getter returns the current count.

grade.command: node -e "import('./lru.mjs').then(m=>{const c=new m.LRU(2);c.set('a',1);c.set('b',2);c.get('a');c.set('c',3);if(c.get('b')!==undefined)throw new Error('b not evicted');if(c.get('a')!==1||c.get('c')!==3)throw new Error('kept');if(c.size!==2)throw new Error('size');console.log('ok')})"
